evidence_summary: Operator is drafting a PCI-DSS incident disclosure for CASE-2026-0005 (card-data-adjacent server compromise). The brief must meet PCI-DSS Requirement 12.10.1 format: incident description, cardholder data systems affected (yes/no), timeline, containment actions, and remediation status. Curator must author the disclosure body using only confirmed evidence from the case memstore.
